purpose: enemy skeleton taxonomy seeds before final monster detailing

records.name: Small biped
records.note: Good base for fodder. Strip final panel details before mannequin modeling.

records.name: Heavy biped
records.note: Good blocker/brute mass. Needs neutral joint landmarks and less finished armor.

records.name: Quadruped beast
records.note: Strong charger base. Remove crystal color identity for neutral template.

records.name: Slime/blob
records.note: Good non-biped body category. Core socket is readable.

records.name: Floating caster
records.note: Good ranged/support hover skeleton. Keep side shields as optional parts.

records.name: Winged flyer
records.note: Useful silhouette, but too close to familiar bat/imp defaults. Needs more original head language.

records.name: Insect/arachnid
records.note: Good crawler template. Simplify shell into neutral body mannequin.

records.name: Serpent/long body
records.note: Useful segmented line-hazard body. Head should become swappable.

records.name: Dragon/wyvern
records.note: Useful dragon category, but the head/wing read is too familiar. Must be reworked before modeling.

records.name: Golem/mech
records.note: Good slow telegraph bruiser. Works as a separate construct skeleton.

records.name: Plant/root
records.note: Good rooted turret/support body. Keep as plant hazard skeleton, not NPC body.

records.name: Boss multi-anchor
records.note: Useful multi-limb socket boss seed. Needs clearer weak-point hierarchy.

records.name: Crab shell
records.note: Good alternate low crawler. Good for shielded side-step enemy.

records.name: Rolling shell
records.note: Good roll/charge hazard. Needs unfolded attack pose concept later.

records.name: Mimic/tool construct
records.note: Good object-enemy skeleton. Keep because ARPG needs surprise/interact enemies.

records.name: Tall support caster
records.note: Readable support silhouette, but too humanoid/staff-like. Rework to avoid generic caster.
